howItWorks.intro: This iran sanctions oil supply impact calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Exports remaining = baseline × enforcement export percentage
Oil price impact = (supply loss / global supply) × elasticity
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much oil does Iran produce?
faq.answer: Iran's production capacity is approximately 3.5-4 million barrels per day. Under maximum sanctions, exports dropped to under 500,000 bpd. With looser enforcement, Iran has exported 1.5-2 million bpd.

faq.question: Who buys Iranian oil under sanctions?
faq.answer: China is the primary buyer, purchasing roughly 80-90% of Iran's sanctioned exports, often at a significant discount. India, Syria, and Venezuela have also purchased Iranian oil.

faq.question: Is the Iran Sanctions Oil Supply Impact Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard geopolitics and energy markets formulas trusted by analysts and informed citizens. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What sanctions enforcement should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate sanctions enforcement value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Iran Sanctions Oil Supply Impact Calculator?
sections.body: The Iran Sanctions Oil Supply Impact Calculator is a free online tool designed for analysts and informed citizens who need quick, accurate calculations in the geopolitics and energy markets space. By entering your sanctions enforcement, iran baseline production, current oil price, you get instant results including iran exports remaining, global supply loss, oil price impact. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting iran exports remaining right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In geopolitics and energy markets, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by analysts and informed citizens worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand global dynamics with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your sanctions enforcement and need to find the right iran exports remaining. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Sanctions Enforcement
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your sanctions enforcement — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: iran baseline production, current oil price, current gas price. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your iran exports remaining, global supply loss, oil price impact. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your sanctions enforcement before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both iran exports remaining and global supply loss — they work together to give you the full picture.
